Class FieldDescriptorInputAndShow

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.dynamic.model.FieldDescriptorInputAndShow
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
FieldDescriptorInputAndShowExtended, FieldDescriptorInputAndShowExtendedEntity
public class FieldDescriptorInputAndShow extends Object implements Serializable

  • Constructor Details

    • FieldDescriptorInputAndShow

      public FieldDescriptorInputAndShow(String fieldName, DataType dataType, Double min, Double max)
      Creates a field descriptor with explicit data type and constraints.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the name of the field
      dataType - the data type for the field
      min - the minimum value/length constraint, or null if no minimum
      max - the maximum value/length constraint, or null if no maximum

    • FieldDescriptorInputAndShow

      public FieldDescriptorInputAndShow(String fieldName, Class<?> type)
      Creates a field descriptor by analyzing a Java class type. The data type is automatically determined from the provided Java class.
      Parameters:
      fieldName - the name of the field
      type - the Java class type to analyze and convert to a DataType
